name: Character
description: Core player character controller with full movement, physics, animations, and interaction systems. This is the fundamental behavior for creating playable characters in your game, providing sophisticated third-person control with realistic physics, smooth animations, and extensive customization options.
documentation:
## Character
The core behavior for creating playable characters. Attach this to a 3D model to make it a controllable character.

### Settings
- **Is Default Character** - Assigns this character to players by default when joining
- **Auto Forward** - Character moves forward automatically
- **Health** - Starting health points (default: 100)
- **Invert Forward Direction** - Flip the model's facing direction

### Movement
- **Walk Speed** / **Run Speed** - Movement speeds
- **Jump Height** - How high the character jumps
- **Climb Speed** - Speed when climbing surfaces
- **Max Slope** - Maximum walkable slope angle
- **Look Speed** - Camera rotation sensitivity
- **Ground/Air Acceleration & Deceleration** - Fine-tune movement feel

### Animations
Assign model animations for each movement state: Idle, Walking, Running, Jumping, Climbing, Crouching, Falling, Dying.

### Tips
- Only one default character per scene
- Requires a 3D model with animations for best results
- Physics is auto-configured (dynamic capsule collider)
author: stemstudio

isDefault.name: Is Default Character
isDefault.description: Assigns this character to players by default when joining. Only one character per scene should have this enabled.

canSwap.name: Can Swap
canSwap.description: When enabled, allows players to swap to this character using interaction button.

autoForward.name: Auto Forward
autoForward.description: When enabled, the character moves forward automatically without player input.

health.name: Health
health.description: Starting health points for the character. Reaches 0 when the character dies.

walkSpeed.name: Walk Speed
walkSpeed.description: Movement speed in units per second when walking.

runSpeed.name: Run Speed
runSpeed.description: Movement speed in units per second when running (hold shift).

jumpHeight.name: Jump Height
jumpHeight.description: Maximum height the character can jump, in world units.

stepHeight.name: Step Height
stepHeight.description: Maximum obstacle height the character can step over without jumping.

climbSpeed.name: Climb Speed
climbSpeed.description: Movement speed when climbing surfaces, in units per second.

maxSlope.name: Max Slope (degrees)
maxSlope.description: Maximum slope angle in degrees that the character can walk up. Steeper slopes will block movement.

pushObjects.name: Push Objects
pushObjects.description: When enabled, colliding with dynamic physics objects applies a push impulse in the character's movement direction.

pushImpulse.name: Push Impulse
pushImpulse.description: Scales the impulse force applied to objects when this character pushes them. Higher values push objects harder.

pushVerticalScale.name: Push Vertical Scale
pushVerticalScale.description: Controls upward force when pushing objects. 0 = no vertical push (default), 1 = full upward force from contact angle. Use higher values for football-style kicking.

kickObjects.name: Kick Objects
kickObjects.description: When enabled, left-click applies a strong kick impulse to nearby dynamic objects in the character's facing direction.

kickImpulse.name: Kick Impulse
kickImpulse.description: Strength of the kick impulse applied to objects. Higher values kick objects harder.

kickAnimation.name: Kick Animation
kickAnimation.description: Animation to play when the character kicks.

lookSpeed.name: Look Speed
lookSpeed.description: Camera rotation sensitivity. Lower values give slower, more precise camera control.

groundAcceleration.name: Ground Acceleration
groundAcceleration.description: How quickly the character reaches full speed on the ground. Higher values feel more responsive.

groundDeceleration.name: Ground Deceleration
groundDeceleration.description: How quickly the character stops on the ground. Higher values make stopping feel snappier.

airAcceleration.name: Air Acceleration
airAcceleration.description: How much the character can change direction while airborne. Lower values feel more realistic.

airDeceleration.name: Air Deceleration
airDeceleration.description: How quickly the character slows down in the air. Lower values allow more air control.

invertForwardDirection.name: Invert Forward Direction
invertForwardDirection.description: When enabled, flips the character model's forward direction. Use this if your model faces the wrong way.

idleAnimation.name: Idle
idleAnimation.description: Animation to play when the character is standing still.

walkAnimation.name: Walking
walkAnimation.description: Animation to play when the character is walking.

runAnimation.name: Running
runAnimation.description: Animation to play when the character is running (holding shift).

jumpAnimation.name: Jumping
jumpAnimation.description: Animation to play when the character is jumping.

climbAnimation.name: Climb
climbAnimation.description: Animation to play when the character is climbing a surface.

crouchAnimation.name: Crouching
crouchAnimation.description: Animation to play when the character is crouching.

fallAnimation.name: Falling
fallAnimation.description: Animation to play when the character is falling through the air.

dieAnimation.name: Dying
dieAnimation.description: Animation to play when the character dies (health reaches zero).
